untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern requires identification of two distinct local minima at similar price levels and confirmation of the peak between them. This multi-bar structural pattern with Adam (narrow/pointed) vs Eve (wide/rounded) subcategories cannot be reliably expressed using point-in-time indicators. The pattern fundamentally requires bar-sequence analysis and local extrema detection across 5-15 bars, which exceeds the scope of single-bar indicator conditions. Approximated with oversold conditions and breakout above midpoint, but accuracy is limited.
